Description

Support for processing SAML authentication requests.

    Methods in se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.config.configurers with parameters of type AuthnContextResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Saml2AuthnRequestAuthenticationProviderConfigurer
    Saml2AuthnRequestAuthenticationProviderConfigurer.authnContextResolver(AuthnContextResolver authnContextResolver)
    Assigns an AuthnContextResolver that is used to resolve authentication context class references.

  • Uses of AuthnContextResolver in se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.settings

    Methods in se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.settings that return AuthnContextResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AuthnContextResolver
    IdentityProviderSettings.getAuthnContextResolver()
    Gets the AuthnContextResolver to use, or null if none is configured.
    Methods in se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.settings with parameters of type AuthnContextResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IdentityProviderSettings.Builder
    IdentityProviderSettings.Builder.authnContextResolver(AuthnContextResolver authnContextResolver)
    Assigns the AuthnContextResolver to use.
